response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical leadership, distributed systems expertise, and experience with event-driven architectures, but lacks direct production experience with multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech contexts. His fintech exposure is limited to a pricing optimization role, and while his work with real-time systems (e.g., at Dunnhumby) is relevant, it doesn't fully align with the agentic AI and credit-risk requirements. His embedded-finance and hybrid-engineering governance experience is also not clearly evidenced.
strengths: Proven distributed-systems and event-driven architecture experience (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby)
Leadership scaling teams from mid-size to staff levels (e.g., Altom Consulting, re:cinq)
Hands-on expertise in real-time systems and low-latency development (e.g., DLang, TypeScript)
concerns: No demonstrated production experience with multi-agent AI systems in commercial contexts
Limited fintech-infrastructure exposure (e.g., credit systems, payment flows, embedded finance)
Lack of clear evidence in designing AI-native fintech integrations (e.g., working-capital management, real-time credit risk)
